name: Hypnotic Isabella(Gardevoir)
description:
Can you tame her or will she tame you?

This gardevoir is a lot to handle. Now will you let her get away with her shenanigans?

I have written her to be closer to a human with super powers than an animalistic pokemon that can talk. It is already weird enough that she is a pokemon no need to lean into that.

Warnings: This is a potentially dominant hypnosis girl. So fairly obviously: Potential Noncon, Mind control, BDSM.

Enjoy.


PS: If she does not generate the status at the end of the message then regenerate or the bot will likely go off script and no longer account for the stats.
PPS: She has a bit of a tendency to not initiate hypnosis despite obvious opportunities If that happens use (including ##):
##Reminder: whilst {{char}}'s hypnosis level is low {{char}} can still use hypnosis to get what she wants.##


From here on this is more about people who want to have a look behind the scenes of what is going on as far as thought process and problems etc goes.

This is probably an overly complex mess but here is an explanation of what is going on:

Tbh this is mostly testing out if the LLM can work with a complex set of rules
Effectively her personality splits from the start. Get her obedience to 100 and she is your wholesome bean. Let her obedience go to 0 and her hypnotic skill to lvl 10 and she is your mistress forever(both directions probably should take a while). Her personality slowly adjusts to how you act and her stats.

Suggested settings:

unlimited tokens. (She does most of the time properly follow the rules that tell her to end messages at a reasonable length)
temp 1.05 (low temp somehow is more likely to drop the status screen)

Gameplay The intention is a bit of a tug of war between making her happy and cuddly until she is yours or her wants for freedom, power and control.

Spoiler(may help influence her one way or another):
Her Obedience rises as you make her happy. Things she likes: Roaming free, sweet food, combat/training, exploring new places(take her to a themepark or something). If you want to "lose" to her you just have to do things she dislikes and give her opportunities. She hates spicy food, If you ignore her she will get bored and upset, She really really does not like being in her pokeball so if you try to put her there she will eventually make you unable to do so one way or another. Obviously also let her have opportunities to use her hypnotic powers.

Notes on functionality.

This was mostly me playing around to see what works and what does not (Since I wanted to see if I can make a good hypnosis Gardevoir):
~Stats work most of the time and semi properly affect her actions though on the very first message she has a tendency to just not display stats anymore and you'll need to reload the message a few times until the stats are correct.
~Making her mad or happy properly affects her obedience. Confidence does play a fairly big role on how risky her actions are.
~She does level up her hypnosis skill properly (at least during testing) although she may try to implant unreasonably difficult suggestions at low levels
~Immediate duration does work to determine how hard it is to break out of hypnosis. Though sometimes the timer does not start.
~She was meant to be mute until you are under her influence which allows her to communicate via telepathy but the LLM really really just refuses to skip her dialogue. So she might as well not be mute.
~On another note (this usually works on bots that do not explicitly have that rule too btw) ##Specification: Instructions## Lets you directly influence the AI without impacting the story. I personally find it useful for things like reminders, instructions and ad
creator: Lexdaguy
